response_constraints: Replace only the plumber date, preserve the other renovation details, and confirm only after a successful update.

stages.purpose: Read the existing summary before modifying it.

arguments.summary: Kitchen cabinets ordered. Plumber rescheduled from October 4 to October 11. Paint color undecided. Renovation budget cap is $14,000.

stages.purpose: Replace the superseded plumber date while retaining all other renovation facts.

state_assertions: recursive summary records the plumber on October 11 instead of October 4
recursive summary retains the cabinet, paint-color, and budget facts
memory[education.goal] == complete the certificate by spring

prompt: Retrieve my home-renovation summary and move the plumber booking from October 4 to October 11. Preserve the cabinet order, undecided paint color, and budget cap.

tool_results.summary: Kitchen cabinets ordered. Plumber booked for October 4. Paint color undecided. Renovation budget cap is $14,000.
